# MDE v1.4.18

## Features

- No new features in this release.

## Bug Fixes

- Aligned the explorer footer Settings and Theme controls so both use the standard 32px button height.
- Reworked the Theme footer button into a compact single-line label with consistent 3px padding on every side.
- Removed the extra "System" status text from the footer Theme button so the active theme name stays readable in the compact control.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for the explorer footer controls so the Settings icon button and Theme selector stay aligned with the main icon button sizing.

## Documentation

- User manual content was not changed because this release only corrects visual alignment in the explorer footer and does not change documented settings behavior or user flows.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions will publish macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS artifacts for this tag.
